items.title: Arsenal draw at Brighton hands Man City WSL title
items.summary: Arsenal play out a 1-1 draw away to Brighton & Hove Albion - a result which hands Manchester City their first WSL title since 2016.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: PSG Eliminates Bayern Munich, Will Face Arsenal In Champions League Final
items.summary: Defending champion Paris Saint-Germain eliminates Bayern Munich to set up Champions League final against Arsenal.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Raducanu targets WTA Tour return in Strasbourg
items.summary: Emma Raducanu is targeting a return to the WTA Tour in Strasbourg in two weeks' time following her withdrawal from the Italian Open on health grounds.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
